finding: pgrep -P only returns direct children (one level). Grandchildren missed for deep process trees.
proposed_action: Use iterative pgrep or ps -eo pid+ppid to walk full tree.

finding: On re-analysis the /proc walk IS correct. It recursively discovers children via pids_to_check. Not a bug.
yappi.start() is global. Concurrent phases would interfere. Unlikely but architecturally unsound.
evidence: core.py:264-265 — global yappi state with no concurrency guard.
proposed_action: Add _yappi_active guard or warn on concurrent phase.

finding: If phase.__enter__() called without __exit__() the cProfile profiler stays enabled indefinitely.
evidence: core.py:261-262 — profiler.enable() with no safety bound.

finding: required_by is a shared mutable list reference. Works correctly but is a subtle pattern.
evidence: capture/packages.py:94 — record shares list with dict.

finding: pgrep fails (exit 1) with no children causing tree RSS to return 0 instead of self RSS.
evidence: capture/resources.py:104-108 — except catches CalledProcessError and returns 0.
proposed_action: Always include self RSS; add children on top.

finding: isatty() on TqdmSafeTee delegates correctly to original stream. Not a bug.
